title: tereo #5083
definition:
1) to attend to carefully, take care of
    1a) to guard
    1b) metaph. to keep, one in the state in which he is
    1c) to observe
    1d) to reserve: to undergo something

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5874\\
